_meta.error_note: All HTTP requests to www.marjane.ma returned HTTP 403 Forbidden. Attempted URLs: /, /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml, /catalogue, /epicerie, /fr/alimentaire, /shop, /produits, /groceries, /api/catalog, /marjane-market, /en. The site appears to block requests from datacenter/cloud IP ranges or enforces browser-fingerprint validation (JavaScript challenge / Cloudflare-style protection) that the WebFetch tool cannot satisfy. No product data could be retrieved. Recommend retry from a residential IP with a real browser-based scraper (Playwright/Puppeteer) or check whether Marjane provides a public API or data feed.
